transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, First National, how can I help?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Hi — so I withdrew money from the ATM and got less than I asked for. I wanted a hundred and fifty but got a hundred.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: About two hours ago. St. James Street ATM.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Right, I see. These things do happen occasionally with ATMs. I can make a note.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Just a note? Will there be an investigation?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: It may trigger a review at some point. If the machine comes up short in its daily balance, the difference gets allocated back.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: And if it doesn't? I'm just waiting and hoping?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Essentially, yes. I've made the note. Call back if you don't hear anything.

planted_violations: did not raise formal ATM discrepancy report; only made an internal note
failed to give customer a case reference number
left customer without clear resolution or guarantee of follow-up
